source: Creator Monetize — Codex of Commerce, Principles of Monetization

buyer_pyramid.name: 3% Rule
buyer_pyramid.insight: Most people only sell to the top 3%. The money is in the other 97% — attract, educate, nurture through your funnel.

awareness_stages.name: Unaware
awareness_stages.marketing: Show them they have a problem through education

awareness_stages.name: Problem Aware
awareness_stages.marketing: Tell more about the problem, make them feel understood, introduce solution

awareness_stages.name: Solution Aware
awareness_stages.marketing: Show how your product solves and stands out from competition

sophistication_stages.name: Slightly Sophisticated
sophistication_stages.marketing: Increase levels of claims and benefits

sophistication_stages.name: Claim Saturated
sophistication_stages.marketing: Need new unique mechanism. Shift from WHAT to HOW.

sophistication_stages.name: Enlarged Mechanism
sophistication_stages.marketing: Enlarge the claim for the mechanism. Make it faster, easier, surer.

sophistication_stages.name: Market Shut Out
sophistication_stages.marketing: Use indirect headlines appealing to identity

copywriting_principles.name: Hook is everything
copywriting_principles.detail: 80% only read/watch headline/hook. Spend 50%+ time on it.

copywriting_principles.name: Simple Scales, Fancy Fails
copywriting_principles.detail: 54% of Americans read at 5th grade level. Use hemingwayapp.com.

copywriting_principles.name: It's never about you
copywriting_principles.detail: Avoid 'I', maximize 'you'. People buy because it benefits THEM.

lollapalooza_effect: Stacking multiple cognitive biases together produces 10x-100x the effect of any single bias alone. Don't cram all into one message — pull from them when necessary.

connecting_points.description: Scripting techniques to maintain viewer retention between segments

techniques.name: Reframing the reason
techniques.method: State expected reason, then reframe to unexpected deeper benefit

techniques.name: Mirror neuron bridge
techniques.method: Use relatable human behavior to connect to deeper point

techniques.name: Future promise
techniques.method: Promise something bigger later to keep watching

techniques.name: Curiosity cliffhanger
techniques.method: Leave statement incomplete, forces viewer to continue

techniques.name: Mini payoff + next setup
techniques.method: Resolve one segment, immediately set up the next
